videos.title: Riding the Gent-Wevelgem Cyclo
videos.description:
Bikes, bergs and beers. A few of the great Belgian things. 

The day before Gent-Wevelgem, some 6,700 cyclists tackled the Gent-Wevelgem Cyclo, and VeloNews editor Fred Dreier and Roll Massif's Ben Delaney jumped into the fray. Come along for the ride along the narrow Flemish lanes, the gravel Plugstreets and the steep and cobbled Kemmelberg.

Want to get out there yourself? Check out https://cyclinginflanders.cc/

videos.title: Gent Wevelgem - BelgiumT1956.79
videos.description:
Climb the steep hills in the northwest of France and West Flanders.
Climb the hills of the freezing cold 2013 Gent-Wevelgem, the 75th edition of this well-known cycling classic, won by Peter Sagan. Starting on the flat roads to the north of Cassel in France, you will soon face a challenging ride over the steep hills in the northwest of France and West Flanders in Belgium. The tough and infamous Kemmelberg has to be climbed twice before ending at the Menen Gate in Ieper. The total distance of the film is 83.5 km.

videos.title: Gent Wevelgem 2008 - Kemmelberg (Peleton 2nd time up)
videos.description: Riders coming up the Kemmelberg the second time. Ballan and Flecha applying some pressure to break the field.

videos.title: Marta Bastianelli Ale Cipollini wins Gent - Wevelgem
videos.description: Former world champion, Marta Bastianelli Ale Cipollini wins the 5th round of the UCI women’s world tour in Belgium
